recommendations.title: Bo Burnham: What.
recommendations.overview: Left brain and right brain duke it out and then belt out a tune in comedian Bo Burnham's quick and clever one-man show. As intelligent as he is lanky, Burnham cynically pokes at pop entertainment while offering unadulterated showmanship of his own.

recommendations.title: Bo Burnham: Make Happy
recommendations.overview: Combining his trademark wit and self-deprecating humor with original music, Bo Burnham offers up his unique twist on life in this stand-up special about  life, death, sexuality, hypocrisy, mental illness and Pringles cans.

recommendations.title: Chris Rock: Tamborine
recommendations.overview: Chris Rock takes the stage for his first comedy special in 10 years, filled with searing observations on fatherhood, infidelity and American politics.

recommendations.title: Eighth Grade
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Kayla endures the tidal wave of contemporary suburban adolescence as she makes her way through the last week of middle school — the end of her thus far disastrous eighth grade year — before she begins high school.

recommendations.title: The Big Sick
recommendations.overview: Pakistan-born comedian Kumail Nanjiani and grad student Emily Gardner fall in love but struggle as their cultures clash. When Emily contracts a mysterious illness, Kumail finds himself forced to face her feisty parents, his family's expectations, and

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: Man on the Moon
recommendations.overview: The story of the life and career of eccentric avant-garde comedian, Andy Kaufman.

recommendations.title: Winners and Sinners
recommendations.overview: Five friends are released from prison and do their best to stay out trouble. While trying to mind their own business (and run their 5-Star Cleaning Service), they are caught up in a war between rival Triad gangs fighting for control of the counterfei

recommendations.title: Heart of Dragon
recommendations.overview: A policeman forsakes his dream of world travel to care for a mentally impaired brother, who is later kidnapped by gangsters.
